title: hedychium coccineum var. carneum
intro: Hedychium coccineum var. carneum, also known as red ginger lily, is a plant species in the family Zingiberaceae, characterized by its vibrant red flowers and medicinal properties. It is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The plant's extracts have been found to exhibit health benefits such as reducing pain and inflammation, as well as exhibiting antioxidant and immune-boosting properties. In herbal medicine, hedychium coccineum var. carneum is often prepared as an essential oil, decoction, or tincture to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various ailments.
